name: Farmhouse Pork and Apple Pie
recipeIngredient: Additional salt and pepper, if desired
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook bacon in an oven-safe skillet until crisp. Remove with a slotted spoon to paper towels to drain.
2. In the drippings of the bacon, sauté onions until tender. Remove with a slotted spoon and set aside.
3. Dust pork lightly with flour. Brown in batches in the drippings, adding oil if needed. Remove from heat and drain excess fat.
4. To the pork, add bacon, onions, apples, sage, nutmeg, salt, and pepper. Stir in cider and water.
5. Cover and bake at 325°F for 2 hours or until the pork is tender.
6. In a saucepan, cook potatoes in boiling water until tender. Drain and mash with milk and 3 tablespoons of butter. Add salt and pepper to taste.
7. Remove skillet from oven and spread mashed potatoes over the pork mixture.
8. Melt remaining butter and brush over the potatoes.
9. Broil 6 inches from heat for 5 minutes or until the topping is browned.
10. Sprinkle with parsley if desired.
